title: HOCH-200 Base VPS + Relay Stack — PERT Setup Plan

phases.name: Provision VPS
phases.description: Provision Linode VPS (Ubuntu 24.04), assign hostname hoch-relay-001

phases.name: Harden Base OS
phases.description: Configure UFW (deny 3012 public), install fail2ban, apply kernel updates
phases.deliverable: ufw active, fail2ban active, evidence file written

phases.name: Install Docker Stack
phases.description: Install Docker 29.6.1, Docker Compose v5.2.0, verify daemon running

phases.name: Deploy Relay Stack
phases.description: Build + deploy relay-api container bound to Tailscale IP 100.87.18.15:3012

phases.name: Verify + Evidence
phases.description: Run hoch200_verify_vps.sh, confirm browser access, generate evidence doc, run E2E tests
phases.deliverable: hoch-200-setup-evidence.md, E2E tests pass, CONDITIONAL_GO confirmed

notes: Port 3012 must not be public — this is a hard constraint validated in P4 and P5.
